tluaGenericForExplistGeneric.tlua(46,21): error TS2345: Argument of type 'number' is not assignable to parameter of type 'number[]'.
tluaGenericForExplistGeneric.tlua(53,22): error TS2554: Expected 1 arguments, but got 2.
tluaGenericForExplistGeneric.tlua(65,19): error TS2345: Argument of type 'number' is not assignable to parameter of type 'Table<never, unknown>'.


==== tluaGenericForExplistGeneric.tlua (3 errors) ====
    interface Rec {
      [key: string]: number;
    }
    
    declare t: Rec;
    
    for k, v in next, t do
      local key: string = k;
      local value: number = v;
    end
    
    for k, v in next, t, "seed" do
      local key: string = k;
      local value: number = v;
    end
    
    declare c: string | nil;
    
    for k, v in next, t, c do
      local key: string = k;
      local value: number = v;
    end
    
    for k, v in pairs(t) do
      local key: string = k;
      local value: number = v;
    end
    
    declare function step<T>(state: T[], i: number | nil): (number | nil, T);
    declare arr: { name: string }[];
    
    for i, x in step, arr, nil do
      local index: number = i;
      local element: { name: string } = x;
    end
    
    declare function ov(state: string[], i: nil): (number | nil, string);
    declare function ov(state: number[], i: nil): (number | nil, boolean);
    declare strings: string[];
    
    for i, value in ov, strings, nil do
      local index: number = i;
      local element: string = value;
    end
    
    for i, value in ov, 42, nil do
                        ~~
!!! error TS2345: Argument of type 'number' is not assignable to parameter of type 'number[]'.
      local index: number = i;
      local element: string | boolean = value;
    end
    
    declare function each<K, V>(state: Table<K, V>): (K?, V);
    
    for k, v in each, t, "oops" do
                         ~~~~~~
!!! error TS2554: Expected 1 arguments, but got 2.
      local key: string = k;
      local value: number = v;
    end
    
    declare function requiredControl(state: Rec, control: string): (string | nil, number);
    
    for k, v in requiredControl, t, nil do
      local key: string = k;
      local value: number = v;
    end
    
    for k, v in next, 42 do
                      ~~
!!! error TS2345: Argument of type 'number' is not assignable to parameter of type 'Table<never, unknown>'.
      k;
      v;
    end

      k;
    end
